message:
feat(hook): show git divergence warning in hook status (gt-7w6cq)

gt hook / gt mol status now checks if the current branch has diverged
from its remote tracking branch and shows a warning with ahead/behind
counts. Uses local refs only (no network fetch) for speed. Warns about
diverged branches, behind branches, and notes unpushed commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
